name: Bright, Modern Garden Unit - 1BR/1BTH
Creative Sanctuary
*FriendlyRoom Apt. Style -UCSF/USF - San Francisco
Historic Alamo Square Victorian
Elegant & Cozy w/City views. Private room: Purple
description:
**Please note that the house behind our backyard is under construction, and daytime noise is common. If this is a concern, please stay with us after construction is complete. **

Our bright garden unit overlooks a lovely backyard area with fruit trees and native plants. It is an oasis in a big city. The apartment comfortably fits a couple or a small family. It is located on a cul-de-sac street that ends at lovely Duboce Park.

We live in a large Victorian house on a quiet street, nestled between the Mission district and Noe Valley. We're one block from the streetcar stop and five blocks from the subway. We have two bedrooms which have double beds and windows which cast their light upon the warm colored walls and ceilings of this haven. We have lots of spaces in the house where you can relax, read, listen to music and just cozy up. The kitchen is well stocked and we have a bountiful garden and back deck.

Nice and good public transportation. 7 minutes walk to UCSF. 15 minutes walk to USF, ST Mary Hospital

Room rental-sunny view room/sink/Wi Fi (inner sunset / UCSF) (map)

The place is located within walking distance to Golden Gate Park, UCSF & USF

For creative humans who love art, space, photography, design, history..

Beautiful natural light. Curated design and furniture. Photo location.

Private upper-unit full-floor flat/apt in a two-unit building.

Fashion and lifestyle brands + content creators who chose our space for their ad campaigns and creative projects:

Airbnb
Google
Everlane
Blue Bottle
Feather
Fellow
Freda Salvador
ThirdLove
Rothys
Rejuvenation
Banana Republic
Nest
Scandinavian Designs
Domino Magazine
Year & Day
Minted
+

Casa de Paz (House of Peace) is like staying with family! If you want to experience San Francisco
like a local...instead of feeling like a tourist, this is the place for you.
Here you will wake up in your own peaceful room, with a view of San Francisco.
host_about: We are a family of four that live upstairs.  We have a large dog who occasionally can be seen in the backyard. We have lived in our home since 2005 and have been renting our apartment since 2008.

Philip: English transplant to the Bay Area and half Spanish adoptive son of hardworking Yorkshire folk. I'm married to the one, engaged to my work and in love with exploring the merging of design art and craft.

Tania: SF raised with a NY energy and an Armenian background that I am proud of. I'm an international journalist, interviewing artists and producing for radio and print. I speak several languages and love to meet people. Found my husband in a cafe in NY and came back to SF to live near my Grandma. Oh, and I love plants.

7 minutes walk to UCSF hospital & school campus.  15 minutes walk to USF, St. Mary Hospital.  5 minute walk to Golden Gate Park/Whole food/ regular food store and many different style restaurants & stores in stylish town.

Two ways public muni transportation in front the building to sunset areas/downtown/Golden Gate Bridge/Cal Train station/Airport.  Other 5 minutes walking distance bus stops to downtown and different areas.

Medium side room with one bed only . Extra large size of room with  one single or one full size bed only. The price just a little bit different but have more space. 

Please email your job offer letter and current official picture ID / acceptable credit report and score and financial information after you make reservation.  

Additional adult person  will be charged per night & One time standard cleaning fee $50  and  security deposit will be collected upon your arrival.   

Wi-Fi signal in common areas.   Large eat in kitchen.  Sunny sitting room.

Not pet/Not for any kinds of smoking/no party.  Quiet hours 8pm-9am

Simple cooking only, We have  cooktop and mini toaster oven with timer.   Refrigerator shared storage is limited and Whole Food supermarket in 7 minutes' walking distance.  Coin operated washer and dryer machine in the building.  No pet, No party, No smoking, not for any kinds of smoking, no candle, no tourist, no transient.
I'm an Interior Stylist living in SF.
